mapper.sql: sp.id, sp.user_id AS userId, sp.attraction_content_id AS attractionContentId, sp.source_type AS sourceType, sp.created_at AS createdAt, a.title AS name, a.addr1 AS address, a.first_image1 AS imageUrl, a.first_image1 AS firstimage, a.content_type_id AS contentTypeId, a.area_code AS areaCode, a.si_gun_gu_code AS siGunGuCode, a.latitude AS latitude, a.longitude AS longitude, a.latitude AS mapy, a.longitude AS mapx
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM saved_places sp JOIN attractions a ON a.content_id = sp.attraction_content_id WHERE sp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sp.created_at DESC, sp.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO saved_places (user_id, attraction_content_id, source_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{attractionContentId}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sourceType}, ''), 'ATTRACTION')) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE source_type = VALUES(source_type), created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
